title: International Court of Justice (Definitional)
summary: Descriptive analysis of International Court of Justice. This fragment explains the definitional aspects of International Court of Justice, covering key factual elements without normative claims.
key_points: Core definitional characteristics of International Court of Justice
Primary source documentation and legal basis

philosophy_guard.statement: This fragment describes what IS - institutional facts, legal provisions, and documented outcomes. It does not advocate for what OUGHT to be.
